children.heading: Agricultural product
children.label: 1 Agricultural product
children.text: The term “agricultural product” means any fresh fruit or vegetable or any commodity or product derived from livestock or fowl, that is marketed in the United States for human consumption.

children.heading: Certificate
children.label: 2 Certificate
children.text: The term “certificate” means a certificate of accreditation issued under this chapter.

children.heading: Laboratory
children.label: 3 Laboratory
children.text: The term “laboratory” means any facility or vehicle that is owned by an individual or a public or private entity and is equipped and operated for the purpose of carrying out pesticide residue analysis on agricultural products for commercial purposes.

children.heading: Pesticide
children.label: 4 Pesticide
children.text: The term “pesticide” means any substance that alone, in chemical combination, or in any formulation with one or more substances, is defined as a pesticide in .section 136(u) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
